results.rendered_html:
apa-√sṛ (impf. -sarat) to slip off from (abl.),  RV. iv, 30, 10 ;
to go away, retreat:
Caus. -sārayati, to make or let go away, remove.

results.rendered_html:
apasṛ 1 P.
1 To walk off, go or get away, depart; apasara itaḥ begone, avaunt, hence, get you gone; apasarāgrataḥ  Pt. 1. 
2 To withdraw, retire, retreat, turn back; yadapasarati meṣaḥ kāraṇaṃ tatprahartuṃ  Pt. 3. 43. 
3 To vanish, disappear; yasyānuṣṭhānena me saṃtativināśaduḥkhamapasarati  Pt. 1. 
4 To escape, elude the sight.
— Caus. To make (a thing or person) go away or retire, take or put away, remove, drive away or off, throw aside; apasāraya ghanasāraṃ  K. P. 9 ; apasāryatāṃ vetralatā  Pt. 1  put aside, take away;  Ms. 7. 149.
